ddls:
CREATE TABLE "moves" (
  "move_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each move */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the move */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the move */,
  "power" REAL /* Power level of the move */,
  "cooldown" REAL /* Cooldown time of the move */,
  "energy" INTEGER /* Energy cost of the move */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the move */,
  "dps" REAL /* Damage-per-second value of the move */,
  "with_stab" REAL /* DPS value of the move with Super Type Advantage Bonus (STAB) */,
  "crit_change" REAL /* Critical hit change of the move */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the move (0.0 to 1.0) */,
  "pp" INTEGER /* Number of Power Points (PP) the move has */,
  "effect_chance" REAL /* Chance of the move's additional effect */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority of the move */,
  "target" TEXT /* Target of the move */,
  "is_z_move" INTEGER /* Whether the move can be used as a Z-Move */,
  "is_max_move" INTEGER /* Whether the move can be used as a Max Move */,
  "generation_introduced" INTEGER /* The generation in which the move was introduced */,
  "description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the move */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("move_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moves_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_moves_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type (e.g., Normal, Fighting, Dragon) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "is_special" INTEGER /* Whether the type is a special type */,
  "is_physical" INTEGER /* Whether the type is a physical type */,
  "is_status" INTEGER /* Whether the type is a status type */,
  "is_pseudo_type" INTEGER /* Whether the type is a pseudo-type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Charge, Fast) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "is_charge" INTEGER /* Whether the category is a charge move */,
  "is_fast" INTEGER /* Whether the category is a fast move */,
  "is_status" INTEGER /* Whether the category is a status move */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pokemon" (
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Pokémon */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the Pokémon */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of the Pokémon */,
  "secondary_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the secondary type of the Pokémon */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the species of the Pokémon */,
  "generation_introduced" INTEGER /* The generation in which the Pokémon was introduced */,
  "is_legendary" INTEGER /* Whether the Pokémon is legendary */,
  "is_mythical" INTEGER /* Whether the Pokémon is mythical */,
  "is_ultra_beast" INTEGER /* Whether the Pokémon is an Ultra Beast */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pokemon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pokemon_secondary_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("secondary_type_id") REFERENCES types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pokemon_moves" (
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the Pokémon */,
  "move_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the move */,
  "learn_method" TEXT /* The method by which the Pokémon learns the move */,
  "level_learned_at" INTEGER /* The level at which the Pokémon learns the move */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Whether the move is a default move for the Pokémon */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pokemon_id", "move_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "move_interactions" (
  "move_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the move */,
  "interacting_move_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the interacting move */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., super effective, not very effective, immune) */,
  "effect_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the interaction effect */,
  "multiplier" REAL /* The damage multiplier for the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("move_id", "interacting_move_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "battle_logs" (
  "battle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each battle */,
  "pokemon_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the Pokémon */,
  "move_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the move used */,
  "opponent_pokemon_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the opponent's Pokémon */,
  "winner" INTEGER /* Whether the Pokémon won the battle */,
  "battle_date" TEXT /* The date of the battle */,
  "battle_round" INTEGER /* The round of the battle in which the move was used */,
  "move_effect" TEXT /* The effect of the move in the battle */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* The weather condition during the battle */,
  "terrain" TEXT /* The terrain condition during the battle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("battle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battle_logs_move_id FOREIGN KEY ("move_id") REFERENCES moves ("move_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battle_logs_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemon ("pokemon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_battle_logs_opponent_pokemon_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_pokemon_id") REFERENCES pokemon ("pokemon_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "move_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "move_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the move */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date of the update */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the update */,
  "version" TEXT /* The version of the game in which the update was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_move_updates_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_move_updates_move_id FOREIGN KEY ("move_id") REFERENCES moves ("move_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "move_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the move */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date of the revision */,
  "revision_description" TEXT /* Description of the revision */,
  "revised_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who made the revision */,
  "version" TEXT /* The version of the game in which the revision was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revisions_revised_by FOREIGN KEY ("revised_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_revisions_move_id FOREIGN KEY ("move_id") REFERENCES moves ("move_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission assigned to the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "assigned_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who assigned the permission */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* The date the permission was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "permission"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_assigned_by FOREIGN KEY ("assigned_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "move_statistics" (
  "move_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the move */,
  "usage_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the move has been used */,
  "win_rate" REAL /* Win rate of the move */,
  "average_damage" REAL /* Average damage dealt by the move */,
  "average_energy_gain" REAL /* Average energy gained by the move */,
  "average_battle_time" REAL /* Average time the move is used in a battle */,
  "most_common_target" TEXT /* Most common target of the move */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("move_id")
)
